tweet.text:
METHODIQ by $ODD will become the world's best dermatologist.

At current user engagement levels, METHODIQ is reviewing tens of thousands of pictures every week to correlate with prescriptions it gave for acne, hyperpigmentation and other dermatological issues. 

With every review it learns to better identify what issue someone had and what treatment they needed. 

No other online dermatology service - including $HIMS - has this tight of a feedback loop. Only METHODIQ has hyperspectral capabilities that $ODD spent $100m developing. Only METHODIQ can SEE if something is working, rather than rely on user feedback alone. 

As a result, only METHODIQ can achieve the customers satisfaction levels it can achieve and it can do so without costly human dermatologists. 

This raises the LTV per customer dramatically which allows METHODIQ to outbid anyone else in auctions for dermatology ads. 

At METHODIQ's current run rate, we might see it exceed $100m in its first year, which would make it the fastest growing new DTC brand in history and dethroning SpoiledChild from the no.1 position, which is another $ODD brand. But METHODIQ won't stop here. It will grow FAR beyond this $100m level. I expect METHODIQ to become the world's largest dermatologist.

profile_bio.description: Aspiring $ODD investor relations team member & Oran Holtzman fanboy. Not affiliated. Not investment advice.
